title: feat: Device Authorization Grant (RFC 8628) for CLI/headless login
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Headless in the Hive
gist.blurb: We've added Device Authorization Grant support so your CLI tools and headless apps can easily authenticate. Just grab the code from your terminal, pop it into your browser, and you're buzzing!
gist.summary: Implemented the RFC 8628 Device Authorization Grant flow to support secure, browser-based authentication for CLI and headless applications.
gist.impact: Developers can now easily integrate Pollinations authentication into terminal tools, scripts, and headless environments without complex workarounds.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee bridging the gap between a headless terminal and a browser. A retro terminal displaying a short code, and Polly holding a small tablet or smartphone to enter it.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a tiny smartphone, looking at a chunky retro computer terminal that displays a glowing authorization code. A cute boxy robot with a blank monitor head waits patiently nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, retro gaming vibes.
